scripts.vercel-build: prisma generate --schema=prisma/editor.prisma && node prisma/deploy-schema.mjs && next build --webpack
scripts.lint: eslint app components hooks lib store blocks templates emails tests types proxy.ts next.config.ts prisma.config.ts instrumentation-client.ts eslint.config.mjs prisma/*.mjs --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:editor: eslint components/editor store hooks lib/editor lib/export lib/audit tests/unit types proxy.ts instrumentation-client.ts --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-editor --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:marketing: eslint app/webs app/plataforma app/about app/blog app/blog-desarrollo-web-mexico app/changelog app/contacto app/faq app/gracias app/integraciones app/legal app/page.tsx app/portafolio app/precios app/proceso app/seguridad app/servicios components/marketing components/section components/ui components/theme --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-marketing --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:marketing-core: eslint app/plataforma app/about app/blog app/blog-desarrollo-web-mexico app/changelog app/contacto app/faq app/gracias app/integraciones app/legal app/page.tsx app/portafolio app/precios app/proceso app/seguridad app/servicios components/marketing components/section --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-marketing-core --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:platform: eslint app/api app/admin app/dashboard 'app/(platform)' app/actions app/checkout app/editor app/preview app/templates app/afiliados app/estado app/p components/forms lib/billing lib/ai lib/auth*.ts lib/checkout*.ts lib/content*.ts lib/editor-db.ts lib/email.ts lib/file-store.ts lib/mercadopago.ts lib/plan-guard*.ts lib/runtime-health*.ts lib/storage-mode.ts lib/stripe*.ts lib/subscription*.ts lib/webhook*.ts tests types prisma.config.ts next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs prisma/*.mjs --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-platform --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:api: eslint app/api lib/billing lib/ai lib/auth*.ts lib/checkout*.ts lib/content*.ts lib/editor-db.ts lib/email.ts lib/file-store.ts lib/mercadopago.ts lib/plan-guard*.ts lib/runtime-health*.ts lib/storage-mode.ts lib/stripe*.ts lib/subscription*.ts lib/webhook*.ts tests types prisma.config.ts next.config.ts eslint.config.mjs prisma/*.mjs --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-api --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
scripts.lint:platform-pages: eslint app/admin app/dashboard 'app/(platform)' app/actions app/checkout app/editor app/preview app/templates app/afiliados app/estado app/p components/forms --cache --cache-location .tmp/eslintcache-platform-pages --concurrency auto --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern
